title: Bradford Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bradford, with a Z-Score of -3.23. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bradford are extremely cold, with a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 12.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 79%, and the wind speed is moderate at 9.4 km/h. 
 No cooling degree days (CDD) are expected, indicating no relief from the cold temperatures.
